---
title: "Descriptive Statistics Presentation"
format: html
embed-resources: true
---
## Libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(survminer)
library(table1)
library(cmprsk)
library(dplyr)
```

## Data Loading
```{r}
heart2 <- read.csv("data/heart2.csv")
heart2_long <- read.csv("data/heart2_long.csv")

```

## Making table 1

### Adding labeled factor versions of certain variables (for table making)
```{r}
# DIAB statuses/types
heart2_long$DIAB <- ifelse(is.na(heart2_long$DIAB), 
                           0, 
                           heart2_long$DIAB) # making NA become 0s
heart2_long$DIAB2 <- factor(heart2_long$DIAB, 
                            levels = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 998),
                            labels = c("Not Reported", "No", "Type I", "Type II", "Type Other", "Type Unknown", "Status Unknown"), 
                            ordered=TRUE)

# Gender
heart2_long$GENDER2 <- factor(heart2_long$GENDER, levels = c("F", "M"),
                              labels = c("Female", "Male"),
                              ordered = TRUE)

# ETHCAT
heart2_long$ETHCAT2 <- factor(heart2_long$ETHCAT, 
                              levels = c(1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9, 998),
                              labels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic", "Asian", "AI/AN", "Hawaiian/Pacific-Islander", "Multiracial", "Unknown"))

# EXCEPTION
heart2_long$EXCEPTION2 <- factor(heart2_long$EXCEPTION, 
                                 levels = c(0, 1),
                                 labels = c("No Exception", "Exception"))
# ESCALATED
heart2_long$ESCALATED2 <- factor(heart2_long$ESCALATED, levels = c(0, 1),
                           labels = c("Stable", "Esclatated"))
```

## Descriptive Statistics Table

```{r}
label(heart2_long$INIT_AGE) <- "Age at Listing"
label(heart2_long$INIT_BMI_NEW) <- "BMI at Listing"
label(heart2_long$GENDER2) <- "Gender"
label(heart2_long$ETHCAT2) <- "Race/Ethnicity"
label(heart2_long$BTYPE_REC) <- "Blood Type"
label(heart2_long$EXCEPTION2) <- "Exception Status"
label(heart2_long$DIAB2) <- "Diabetes"
label(heart2_long$ESCALATED2) <- "Escalated Status"

# Making a dataset with unique waitlist ID codes
heart2_unique_id_codes <- 
  heart2_long %>% 
  distinct(WL_ID_CODE, .keep_all = T)


# The Actual Table for Descriptive Statistics
table1(
  ~ INIT_AGE +
    INIT_BMI_NEW +
    GENDER2 +
    ETHCAT2 +
    BTYPE_REC +
    EXCEPTION2 +
    DIAB2 |
    ESCALATED2,
  data = heart2_unique_id_codes,
  caption = "Table 1. Descriptive Statistics by Escalation Status"
)
```



## Cumulative Incidence Plots
```{r}
heart2_long <- heart2_long %>%
  mutate(EVENT_TYPE = case_when(
      # Death / deterioration
      REM_CD_NEW %in% c(5,8,13) ~ 1,
      # Transplanted (deceased or living donor)
      REM_CD_NEW %in% c(2,3,4,14,21,22) ~ 2, 
      # Censor everyone else
      TRUE ~ 0),
# Creating TIME_FROM_LANDMARK, TIME_30, and EVENT_30 Variables
TIME_FROM_LANDMARK = as.numeric(FTIME) - 7,
TIME_30 = pmin(TIME_FROM_LANDMARK, 30),
EVENT_30 = case_when(TIME_FROM_LANDMARK <= 30 & EVENT_TYPE != 0 ~ EVENT_TYPE,
      TRUE ~ 0))
```
